Module com.example.escriturarapida
Package com.example.escriturarapida.model

Class TimerModel

java.lang.Object
com.example.escriturarapida.model.TimerModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITimer
public class TimerModel extends Object implements ITimer
Model responsible for game timer logic.
